risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of precise datum.
risk.mit: Implement additional alignment features such as dowels or pins.

risk.desc: Risk of damage to CFRP layup during handling due to sharp edges.
risk.mit: Add rounded edges and chamfers to all critical components.

risk.desc: Possible strain on harnesses if bend radius is not respected.
risk.mit: Ensure all harnesses follow the specified minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect mating due to unlabeled connectors.
risk.mit: Label all connectors and ensure keying or unique identifiers.

risk.desc: Potential for misinterpretation of display-only functionality.
risk.mit: Clearly mark all display-only components as non-functional.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of precise alignment features.
risk.mit: Add alignment pins or keys to ensure repeatable assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of damage to the cutaway window during handling or installation.
risk.mit: Design the cutaway window with reinforced edges and provide clear handling instructions.

risk.desc: Engine display cartridge may not be easily removable if not designed properly.
risk.mit: Ensure the engine display cartridge has clear removal features and is not fused into the shell.
